title: Airport Check-in 机场值机
scene: 一家人到机场办理登机手续。

lines.en: Hello, we'd like to check in for our flight to Beijing, please.
lines.zh: 你好，我们想办理去北京的航班值机。

lines.en: May I see your passports and tickets, please?
lines.zh: 请出示您的护照和机票。

lines.en: Here you go. We have three people in our group.
Do you have any luggage to check in?
Yes, we have two big suitcases. Are they within the weight limit?
lines.zh: 有的，我们有两个大行李箱。在重量限制内吗？

lines.en: Let me weigh them. Yes, they are both fine. Under twenty-three kilos each.
lines.zh: 让我称一下。是的，都合格。每个都在二十三公斤以下。

lines.en: That's good to hear. Can we have window seats?
lines.zh: 太好了。我们可以要靠窗的座位吗？

lines.en: I'll try my best. Here are your boarding passes. Gate number twelve.
lines.zh: 我尽量。这是您的登机牌。十二号登机口。

lines.en: What time should we be at the gate?
lines.zh: 我们应该什么时候到登机口？

lines.en: Please arrive at the gate at least thirty minutes before departure. Have a nice trip!
lines.zh: 请在起飞前至少三十分钟到达登机口。祝您旅途愉快！
